Services growth + AI integration; defensive tech floor

Brazil produces ~35% of world coffee. June–August frost events in Minas Gerais can destroy crops. Even forecasts (not confirmed events) move futures 10–30% in days.

S&P additions force index funds (trillions AUM) to buy the new component before the effective date. Announced ~5 trading days ahead. Average impact: +5–8% announcement to effective date.

All-clear results unlock dividend hikes and buyback authorizations. The bank with the highest capital buffer raises its dividend most aggressively → immediate re-rating.
outside_opps.exit_trigger: 4 weeks post-results OR any major fail

outside_opps.reason: Monthly/quarterly BTC options expiry on Deribit moves $5–15B notional. Price gravitates toward max pain strike (where most options expire worthless) in the week before expiry.
outside_opps.exit_trigger: Expiry day OR max pain price achieved

outside_opps.reason: Semi lead times are a 6-month leading indicator. Expanding lead times → supply shortage → pricing power → margin expansion. Equipment makers lead the cycle by 6 months.
Semi lead times are a 6-month leading indicator. Expanding lead times → supply shortage → pricing power → margin expansion. Equipment makers lead the cycle by 6 months.
